title: Grand Corridor

The '''Grand Corridor''', also known as the '''Grand Reception Hall''', was the hub of all activity within the [[Imperial Palace/Legends|Imperial Palace]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].

==History==
The Grand Corridor was a massive concourse that wrapped around the Coruscant Imperial Palace, connecting to many of the Palace's main areas via hallways or [[Turbolift/Legends|turbolifts]]. Designed by [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] himself, the hall was built to serve as a hub of activity for the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] many functionaries and dignitaries.<ref name="CATCW" />

When the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Liberation of Coruscant (Galactic Civil War)|liberated]] Coruscant and ousted the Imperials, the new government took the Palace and began using it as the headquarters of all government activity on the planet. Unbeknownst to the Republic leaders, Palpatine's secret spy network called [[Delta Source]], a tool he had long used against his own people, was still active and in working order. Once the Republic discovered the information leak, officials quickly removed the [[ch'hala tree]]s that were supplying the data, and the Palace became safe again.<ref name="HTTE" />

The Grand Corridor remained in good condition during the reign of the New Republic until the [[Battle of Coruscant (Yuuzhan Vong War)|invasion]] of Coruscant by the [[Yuuzhan Vong]]. The Palace would be reduced to rubble when [[Chief of State (New Republic)/Legends|Chief of State]] [[Borsk Fey'lya]] detonated a massive explosion in the upper levels, raining rubble upon the Corridor.<ref name="TUF" />

==Layout==
A cavernous hall that ringed the Palace proper's first several levels, the Grand Corridor was a mass of carved black stone and red-tinted cutglass windows. Open to the public and the hub of all activity in the Palace, the Corridor was large enough to accommodate a [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory'' Star Destroyer]] and was personally designed by [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] himself. The corridor held a number of cafes and beverage stands, lining both the ground level and upper balconies that peered out from the inner walls of the hall. Planted at intervals along the walls was a grove of [[ch'hala tree]]s, apparently for decorative purposes but actually a sinister tool that enabled the effectiveness of Palpatine's secret spy network known as [[Delta Source]]. The vibration-sensitive bark of the trees would transmit data to a secret location that would decipher the conversations held in the hall and relay any state secrets or plots back to the Emperor himself.<ref name="CATCW" />
